reviews.author: Mama Tried
reviews.text: Josh was absolutely amazing!!! Honest, Godly and a first responder to boot. He not only communicated with me every time I emailed a question or concern, but got my 86yo Mom’s house and outbuilding white as snow, he then left to go to my Aunts & Uncles across Wilmington to give them a quote and started working the same day…can you find any better service?

reviews.author: MIKEY PARKS
reviews.text: He showed up on time and went above and beyond getting my house and sidewalk and driveway cleaned and looking NEW !! highly recommend !!!!

reviews.author: Susan Chesson
reviews.text: Josh was super efficient & communicative. Great service all around!

reviews.author: Justin
reviews.text: High Tide Soft Wash did a fantastic job power washing the house. He was courteous, respectful and timely. Would recommend anyone to reach out for a quote.

reviews.author: Jason Bolen
reviews.text: Josh is a quality guy and does quality work. What more could you ask for!? Shows up on time, does an incredible job, and all at a respectable price. Our house has never looked better. Thank you High Tide Soft Wash!

reviews.author: BL Collins
reviews.text: Our home sparkles like new! The customer walk around and review is a nice way to wrap up the job, excellent touch.

reviews.author: Jacob Kidd
reviews.text: They did a great job on my house and driveway! Great communication and timeliness all around.  Would recommend to anyone and will have them come back!

reviews.author: AyyECHO Official
reviews.text: Highly professional and extremely transparent.  The guy who washed our house was extremely informative and made sure to explain what he was going to do as well as taking care to make sure all of our stuff outside was situated before he started with chemicals.  He definitely paid attention to detail.  Would definitely use again and have recommended him to family members already.

reviews.author: Justin Bridge
reviews.text: Josh did a great job cleaning our home. He taped off doors, fixtures, and anything else he was worried about getting wet.  He even went as far as to cover our porch shade on the back of the house to ensure it didn't discolor. Solid effort, fantastic job. Couldn't ask for anything beyond that. Would recommend!

reviews.author: Dale Nixon
reviews.text:
Highly recommend High Tide Soft Wash to all my neighbors. Josh, owner and operator of the business is professional, on time, focuses on work quality and complete . customer satisfaction. Josh pre-wet and helped cover all my plants. Very personable and courteous. He was not satisfied with the quality of cleaning on a very small portion of  my front porch floor and went back and rewashed  it a second time of his own volition with no prompting by me. The quality of the complete house soft wash was excellent. Josh took great care of my property and I'll definitely call him again next year! Thank you Josh!
Dale and Pat Nixon

reviews.author: Sandy Evangelista
reviews.text: I highly recommend High Tide Soft Wash to clean your home. Josh did a fantastic job getting rid of the pollen, mold, dirt and cobwebs from our home! It looks brand new! He is also excellent with communication and fit me in the schedule quickly.

reviews.author: Dana Pawinski
reviews.text: Josh was highly professional, on time, performed above expectations and even covered exterior electrical outlets for added protection. No more dirt, algae, or residue! Highly recommend their services!

reviews.author: Lara Witschen
reviews.text: Great owner, customer service, and work! We will definitely use him again!

reviews.author: Traci Brown
reviews.text: Very pleased !!!! You cant go wrong hiring High Tide ! Pressure washed our house & driveway and did an amazing job ! I cant complain at all and his price was on point

reviews.author: Kristin Britt
reviews.text: Josh did a great job. Highly recommend!! Easy to schedule and quick to respond. Our house and patios look great!

reviews.author: James Foutty
reviews.text: Fast, efficient, great work at a great price. Would recommend and use again!

reviews.author: Josh Richards
reviews.text: Josh did an incredible job restoring our property to it's "new" condition with his pressure washing expertise!  Absolutely recommend!  Great work!
